title: eriocoma microcephala
intro: Eriocoma microcephala, also known as 'Rock Rose' or 'Pincushion Grass', is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Eriocoma microcephala include its potential to treat various skin conditions, such as eczema, acne, and wounds, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Eriocoma microcephala are typically made into teas, infusions, or salves, which can be used externally to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
